name: Rill Data
description: Rill Data — OSS BI tool providing instant pre-aggregated dashboards powered by DuckDB with sub-second query performance.

seo.title: Rill Data — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Rill Data: Rill Data — OSS BI tool providing instant pre-aggregated dashboards powered by DuckDB with sub-second query performance.

when_to_use: Instant pre-aggregated dashboards on DuckDB for sub-second BI
OSS BI tool replacing Looker for code-driven data modeling
Metrics exploration on Parquet or DuckDB files with SQL
Collaborative data dashboard development in version control
No-infrastructure analytics on small to medium data volumes

pros: OSS core aligns with modern data stacks
cons: Community smaller than Metabase or Superset
review.verdict: Best-in-class for fast operational dashboards, but not a full Metabase or Looker replacement.
review.best_for: Data teams needing fast operational dashboards over event streams
review.not_for: Orgs wanting a general-purpose BI tool for varied ad-hoc analysis

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
